summary: Your Spring 2026 payment buttons are now active in the parent portal. Your remaining class balance is $1,142.50 ($691.00 for Andrea and $451.50 for Camila).
How to pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments → Upcoming Payments → click Pay Now on each row and complete checkout with your card.
Approved account credits ($190.00 total) will apply automatically when you pay, which may reduce the card amount charged.
Your 2026 membership is paid in full ($175.00, $0 balance). Spring session ends June 12 — please pay at your earliest convenience.
If Pay Now does not appear or a payment fails, reply to this email and we will help right away.
